title: Vortik Open Schema — Commitment
description: Machine-readable schema for the Commitment semantic anchor within the Vortik Semantic Registry. Research-facing and protocol-adjacent surface; not an official Ethereum protocol specification.

classification.description: Semantic classification within the Vortik registry. The underlying term is technically relevant, while the ENS suffix introduces naming mismatch.

status.description: Current maturity/status of the tracked surface.

type.description: Structural type of this tracked surface.

pipeline_position.description: Interpretive pipeline stages where commitment semantics are relevant.

coordination_role.description: Key coordination functions associated with commitment semantics.

ens.description: ENS anchor associated with this registry entry.

canonical.description: Canonical term tracked by the registry entry.

mismatch.description: Indicates that the ENS name contains a non-canonical suffix.

notes.description: Explanation of the naming mismatch and semantic risk.

sources.description: Primary source references for this anchor.
